ops.title: cc-transcript: release the mining subcommands + grep flag fixes
ops.description: Released cc-transcript@0.9.0 lacks the commands/permissions/corrections subcommands present in the dev checkout at ~/Code/cc-transcript; grep rejects comma --kind (wants repeated flags), lacks --with-result, and requires pattern-before-flags — all hit live during AUDIT-PLF-2026-07 (papercut in cc-skills store, 2026-07-22). Also: no corpus lock/shared index means concurrent full-corpus scans thrash (40+ min at 5GB RSS vs 67s solo) — a documented concurrency cap or an index would fix fan-out mining. Cut a release with the subcommands; consider the concurrency note in --help.

ops.text: uvx cc-transcript@<new> commands/permissions/corrections all work against the corpus
grep flag surface documented and matching the released binary
GAP-2 mining task unblocked (records the new pinned version)
